prompt: Create a detailed anime-style cozy evening illustration of two cute girls sitting side by side in a warm modern condominium living room, playing video games together. The left character, Yuri, is a petite kemonomimi fox/cat-eared girl with short fluffy brown hair, large animal ears with pale inner fur, wearing a dark navy-and-white sailor-style sporty hoodie outfit, black shorts, wrist guards, ankle socks, and black-and-white sneakers; she sits upright on a beige sofa, knees together, holding a black game controller with a glowing blue light. The right character, Momiji, is a delicate long-haired girl with flowing dark purple-black hair, a pink headband, pink flower hair ornaments, and ribbon details, wearing a frilly pastel pink dress with puff sleeves, lace trim, floral embroidery, and a brown belt; she sits on an oversized translucent iridescent custom gaming cushion shaped like a giant soap bubble, holding a custom pink game controller. Include exactly 2 main characters, exactly 2 handheld controllers, and many floating soap bubbles of different sizes throughout the room, including one very large bubble-like cushion under the right character and one large bubble near the left side of the sofa. The room should feel intimate and luxurious: beige couch, patterned rug, wooden coffee table with snacks and drinks in the foreground, warm floor lamp, shelves and kitchenette/bar area in the background, framed snowy mountain picture on the wall, houseplants, books, photo frames, and a large window showing a snowy night landscape. Use warm amber indoor lighting mixed with cool blue moonlight from the window, glossy highlights, soft reflections on bubbles, highly polished anime rendering, intricate fabric folds, cute game-night atmosphere, cinematic composition, 4:3 horizontal aspect ratio. Keep both faces softly obscured or featureless, as if anonymized, while preserving hair, outfits, poses, and controllers clearly. No text, no watermark, no UI, no extra characters.
